name: Lemon Squeezy
description: Read and act on Lemon Squeezy commerce data — orders, subscriptions, customers, products, variants, license keys, discounts, payouts — from any AI agent. 14 tools, Bearer auth. JSON:API spec compliant.
instructions:
This connector uses the Lemon Squeezy API v1.

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://app.lemonsqueezy.com → **Settings → API → + Create API key**.
2. Name it ('AnythingMCP'), select the store this key acts on (or 'All stores' if you have multiple).
3. Copy the key. It's prefixed with `eyJ...` (it's a JWT, but treat as opaque). Set `LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${LEMONSQUEEZY_API_KEY}` + `Accept: application/vnd.api+json` (the adapter sets the Accept header automatically per endpoint).

**JSON:API conventions**: every response wraps data in `{data: ..., meta: {page: {...}}, links: {...}}`. Each resource has `id`, `type`, `attributes`, `relationships`. **Use `?include=` to side-load related resources** in one call — e.g. `?include=order-items,customer` on an order. Without `include`, the relationships only return IDs and require N+1 lookups.

**Filtering**: `?filter[store_id]=NNN`, `?filter[status]=paid`, etc. The adapter exposes the most common filters per endpoint.

**Pagination**: `?page[number]=N` and `?page[size]=M` (max 100). `meta.page.lastPage` tells you the total. 

**Mode (test vs live)**: every object has a `test_mode` boolean attribute. The same API key can act on either; mode is determined by the resource you reference (test resources are created when your store is in test mode).

**Store IDs**: most resources scope to a store. Find your store_id via `lemonsqueezy_list_stores` once. If you only have one store, every list call defaults to it.

**License keys** are a Lemon Squeezy first-class product type — useful for SaaS apps. The adapter exposes list + retrieve. Activation/deactivation lives at the public license-keys endpoint (different auth) and is intentionally out of scope here.

**Webhooks** out of scope (configured in the UI and delivered to your hosted endpoint).

**Rate limits**: 300 req/min per API key. On 429, back off. `Retry-After` header is set.

**Out of scope here**: writes to products/variants/files (Lemon Squeezy is a curated marketplace and asks you to manage catalog via UI), checkout link creation (use the simpler hosted-checkout URL), affiliates, store theme.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_get_current_user
tools.description: Return the user the API key belongs to (whoami). Also confirms the key is valid.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_stores
tools.description: List stores the API key has access to. Returns each store's id, name, slug, domain, url, currency, plan, payment_processors[], default_currency, total_sales, total_revenue.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_products
tools.description: List products for a store. Each product has name, slug, description, price (cents), thumb_url, status (published/draft), variants_count.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_variants
tools.description: List variants — the SKUs of a product (e.g. monthly vs annual plan, or different licensing tiers). Each variant has price, interval, interval_count, is_subscription, has_license_keys.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_customers
tools.description: List customers for a store. Each customer has email, name, status, country, total_spent, total_revenue_currency.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_get_customer
tools.description: Fetch one customer with their full purchase history (use include=orders,subscriptions).

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_orders
tools.description: List orders for a store with optional filters. Each order has identifier, order_number, user_email, currency, subtotal, tax, total (cents), status (paid/refunded/pending/failed), refunded, refunded_at, created_at.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_get_order
tools.description: Fetch one order with full details. Include order-items to see line items.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_subscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions with status filters. Each subscription has status (on_trial/active/past_due/unpaid/cancelled/expired), renews_at, ends_at, trial_ends_at, billing_anchor, urls (update_payment_method, customer_portal).

status.description: on_trial, active, past_due, unpaid, cancelled, expired.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_get_subscription
tools.description: Fetch one subscription with detailed billing state.

include.description: Side-load order, customer, variant, product, subscription-invoices.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel a subscription. By default cancels at period end (renews_at). The customer keeps access until renews_at. Use this for self-service cancellation flows; for immediate termination + refund, refund via lemonsqueezy_get_order's refund link instead.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_license_keys
tools.description: List license keys (relevant for products with has_license_keys=true). Each key has key (the actual license string), status (inactive/active/expired/disabled), activation_limit, instances_count, expires_at, customer_id.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_discounts
tools.description: List discount codes for a store. Each discount has name, code, amount, amount_type (percent/fixed), starts_at, expires_at, status, uses, max_uses.

tools.name: lemonsqueezy_list_payouts
tools.description: List payouts to your bank account (Lemon Squeezy as Merchant of Record handles tax + remits net to you). Each payout has amount, status, date_paid, currency.
